---
title: "Information Transfer Improvement by Parallax Correction and Ptychography Reconstruction Applied to Large-Area 4D STEM Experiments"
type: "article"
author: "D. Stroppa, S. Ribet, G. Varnavides, C. Ophus, P. Pelz"
year: "2024"
publication: "BIO Web of Conferences 129, 04027"
preprint: ""
doi: "10.1051/bioconf/202412904027"
materials: ""
code_url: ""
project_page_url: ""
toc: false
categories:
  - ptychography
  - electron microscopy
# --- citation metrics (auto-managed; do not edit) ---
cited_by_count: 0
fwci: 0.00
citation_percentile: 26.5
is_oa: true
oa_status: diamond
keywords:
  - "Parallax"
  - "Ptychography"
metrics_updated: "2026-05-04T07:24:55Z"
# --- end citation metrics ---
---
## Citation (APA 7)

> Information Transfer Improvement by Parallax Correction and Ptychography Reconstruction Applied to Large-Area 4D STEM Experiments
D. Stroppa, S. Ribet, G. Varnavides, C. Ophus, P. Pelz
BIO Web of Conferences 129, 04027


## Abstract

[Abstract will be added manually]
